TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pangiha a tilid-Yincienhuy == Pakowad to patokoan a siciaan no yincumin - mipa'es to nikapolongan a ngiha sapiliyang to Congko midawa to Taywan. I pisi'ayaw to caayayho a kafokafok sakowan no Taywan i, caay kanga'ay no Yincuminco a misatalimaan. Tona fedfedan no ka'aloman no sician, mapatalaw ko nikapolongan kakawa, malasakatayal no sician kasarekad ko Lipoiing no Yincumin itiya, o mamiliyaw mi'afas patireng kami to sakifinacadan a sician sapangiha salongoc. Malapowin ko kasafinacadan dayhiw no sician a kasarekad Ira ko aenemay patodongan a Lipoiing i laocan no kitakit o a itini kasasiroma masasifeday Taywn a finacadan no yincumin to "paecasan" a sacecayay patokoan a siciaan, o sakalacecayaw pngiha itini no Payrangan sician to sapangiha a salongoc. Nika "o dayhiw no finacadan ko kacitodong a iing no yincuminco i laocan" han i caay aca pilaheci tonini, matiniay a paecasan a sician ahan malapowin aca. O mamiliyang to sakaeca ka palangarifan no mita'o'ay, matini sato o mita'o'ay a kasarekad ko mikadotay to kinaira, mapalit to ko sakacowat no finacadan. Itini miheca saka 4 foladan masapinang ko tinako, malitosaay a lipoiing no yincumin mikotod ci Fu Kunqian tayra i Congko miliso' ci Wang Huningan. O siikoray to nikapolongan no Taywan a pinangan koni, mangalef o pakangodoay to patoko a siciaan no yincuminco. O cipatokoay no finacadan ko fayfay, palosida' to misatekeday sakowan, mihakenoay to nikapolongan telek, masasilecad to kalalood, matiniay o caayay pilaheci to niyah a pikowan, mangalef ko pisiikor to sakalekapotaw no yincuminc. Miasimaanay to katatelek, masakasak aca ko nikapolongan Nanoya misarocod i mafolaay sapico'ayaw palowad to lipoiing, pahapinangay to misatekeday sakowan a pinangan. Tona mimangahan ngangan no tao to pilingangan mipalowad to mifolaay demak, misi'ayaw aca to kaciraraw ko yincuminco a tamdaw i, manengneng ko kasakasak salongoc no tamdawan no finacadan ita, ato pakayniay sician a demak ko pisamsam to finacadan. Caay ko talingafoh sanay a demak ko nian, oya tadamanay sician sinalit a mato: tona o cecay a kasarekad "masasipainiay" to nisatekeday a congkong a pakinali, misatapang i laloma'an no Taywan midemak to "misatekeday pikowan" a kasasipaini minanam i, manengneng no mita ko nikapolongan a malahorac to. Micoker to pipalasawad, midama to nikapolongan a sakowan Misa'ayaw to mirawraway to sakowan i laocan, micoker kami to palowad no finawlan a mipalsawaday a demak. caay ko pilala'is no kasarekad, o sapidamaaw to nikapolongan a lakakawa. Tona langdaway kahecalay a tosaay kasarekad pakayni i nisingkiwan lekakawa, o "mangahay ka'aloman" mi'epiay to laocan, mikari'ang to pakayraan no kimpo i, o pipalasawad ko saikoray sapipatolas a sakadademak no finawlan. Mi'ang'ang kami o finawlan, akaa ka "no finacadan ko harateng" mifalod a micoker to misiikoray to nikapolongan, milecad to milefoay o "finacadan a dayhiw" ya sanay. So'elinay patokoan no yincuminco, caay ko miringiay to sowal ato 'icel no tao, oya itiniay i nikapolongan a rikec ko sapilongoc to sakacisapakonara ato sakacitari'ang. Patirengen ko patokoan sici a demak ko pi'ang'ang O pi'ang'ang niyam: Ono finacadan a patokoan caay ko pifelih milayap to roma a nisa'icelan harateng ko sapasadak, caay ko sapidapong to saki nikapolongan a ciepocay a mifelih. O yincuminco caay ko i nimaay sician kasarekad a mikapiay, caay ko nanosician a sakadademak. Tona pipalasawad a lakakawa mala sapico'ay no kasarekad a sakatayal, ono yincuminco a mala sapico'ay a sician ko pikihatiya, o tatomireng kami a pasowal to caayay. O sakatadamaan no pipatireng to paecasan no sakatayal i sician to sapi'emet a sakowan, caayay i midoedoay milayap i masakaminaway ko harateng. O kangalayan oya so'elinay to sakifinacadan a pangiha, midama to kinaira no finawlan, mi'imer to nikapolongan sakaciepoc a dayhiw, caay ko maloyakyakay ano eca nilooday no kasarekad a sakatayal. Misi'ayaw to tatayni nisatekeday 'adingo, kami ato polong no sakipakoniraay ato tamdawan salongoc misa'icel to kalaceay i finawlan no Taywan. O nikapolongan caay ko nano nipasingkiw a paya ko pipolongan, o sakadamaaw no salongan a tamdaw; caay ko sowal aca ko sapakonira a pihapiw, o so'elinay a nisimawan. O ikor no Taywan yincuminco, o mamipatireng i nikapolongan kimpo a mapalamit, caay ko i nisatekedan a mapelengay. Taywan yincuminco salongoc yofayof. Taywan yincuminco niyaro' lekatep. Taywan yincuminco matayalay lekatep. Taywan yincumin sacefang. 2025/724
S.PHON: == paŋiħa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ-jinʦiənħo~u~uj == pako~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u pato~uko~uan a siʦiaan no~u jinʦo~u~umin - mipaʡəs to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a ŋiħa sapiɾijaŋ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u miɬ~ɮawa to~u tajwan. i pisiʡajaw to~u ʦaajajħo~u a kafo~ukafo~uk sako~uwan no~u tajwan i, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a misataɾimaan. to~una fəɬ~ɮfəɬ~ɮan no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u siʦian, mapataɾaw ko~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kakawa, maɾasakatajaɾ no~u siʦian kasarəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾipo~uiiŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin itija, o~u mamiɾijaw miʡafas patirəŋ kami to~u sakifinaʦaɬ~ɮan a siʦian sapaŋiħa saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. maɾapo~uwin ko~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u siʦian a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u aənəmaj pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a ɾipo~uiiŋ i ɾao~uʦan no~u kitakit o~u a itini kasasiro~uma masasifəɬ~ɮaj tajwn a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u "paəʦasan" a saʦəʦajaj pato~uko~uan a siʦiaan, o~u sakaɾaʦəʦajaw pŋiħa itini no~u pajraŋan siʦian to~u sapaŋiħa a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. nika "o~u ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a iiŋ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i ɾao~uʦan" ħan i ʦaaj aʦa piɾaħəʦi to~unini, matiniaj a paəʦasan a siʦian aħan maɾapo~uwin aʦa. o~u mamiɾijaŋ to~u sakaəʦa ka paɾaŋarifan no~u mitaʡo~uʡaj, matini sato~u o~u mitaʡo~uʡaj a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u mikaɬ~ɮo~utaj to~u kinaira, mapaɾit to~u ko~u sakaʦo~uwat no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. itini miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan masapinaŋ ko~u tinako~u, maɾito~usaaj a ɾipo~uiiŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin miko~uto~uɬ~ɮ ʦi fo~u~u ko~u~un*ian tajra i ʦo~uŋko~u miɾiso~uʡ ʦi waŋ ħo~u~uniŋan. o~u siiko~uraj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan a pinaŋan ko~uni, maŋaɾəf o~u pakaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u pato~uko~u a siʦiaan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. o~u ʦipato~uko~uaj no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u fajfaj, paɾo~usiɬ~ɮaʡ to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj sako~uwan, miħakəno~uaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan təɾək, masasiɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, matiniaj o~u ʦaajaj piɾaħəʦi to~u nijaħ a piko~uwan, maŋaɾəf ko~u pisiiko~ur to~u sakaɾəkapo~utaw no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦ. miasimaanaj to~u katatəɾək, masakasak aʦa ko~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan nano~uja misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ i mafo~uɾaaj sapiʦo~uʡajaw paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾipo~uiiŋ, paħapinaŋaj to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj sako~uwan a pinaŋan. to~una mimaŋaħan ŋaŋan no~u tao~u to~u piɾiŋaŋan mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u mifo~uɾaaj ɬ~ɮəmak, misiʡajaw aʦa to~u kaʦiraraw ko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw i, manəŋnəŋ ko~u kasakasak saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮawan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ita, ato~u pakajniaj siʦian a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u pisamsam to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. ʦaaj ko~u taɾiŋafo~uħ sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u nian, o~uja taɬ~ɮamanaj siʦian sinaɾit a mato~u: to~una o~u ʦəʦaj a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ "masasipainiaj" to~u nisatəkəɬ~ɮaj a ʦo~uŋko~uŋ a pakinaɾi, misatapaŋ i ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u tajwan miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "misatəkəɬ~ɮaj piko~uwan" a kasasipaini minanam i, manəŋnəŋ no~u mita ko~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a maɾaħo~uraʦ to~u. miʦo~ukər to~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ, miɬ~ɮama to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a sako~uwan misaʡajaw to~u mirawrawaj to~u sako~uwan i ɾao~uʦan, miʦo~ukər kami to~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan a mipaɾsawaɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ʦaaj ko~u piɾaɾaʡis no~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ, o~u sapiɬ~ɮamaaw to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a ɾakakawa. to~una ɾaŋɬ~ɮawaj kaħəʦaɾaj a to~usaaj kasarəkaɬ~ɮ pakajni i nisiŋkiwan ɾəkakawa, o~u "maŋaħaj kaʡaɾo~uman" miʡəpiaj to~u ɾao~uʦan, mikariʡaŋ to~u pakajraan no~u kimpo~u i, o~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u saiko~uraj sapipato~uɾas a sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u finawɾan. miʡaŋʡaŋ kami o~u finawɾan, akaa ka "no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u ħaratəŋ" mifaɾo~uɬ~ɮ a miʦo~ukər to~u misiiko~uraj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan, miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u miɾəfo~uaj o~u "finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮajħiw" ja sanaj. so~uʡəɾinaj pato~uko~uan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, ʦaaj ko~u miriŋiaj to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u tao~u, o~uja itiniaj i nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a rikəʦ ko~u sapiɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaʦisapako~unara ato~u sakaʦitariʡaŋ. patirəŋən ko~u pato~uko~uan siʦi a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u piʡaŋʡaŋ o~u piʡaŋʡaŋ nijam: o~uno~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a pato~uko~uan ʦaaj ko~u pifəɾiħ miɾajap to~u ro~uma a nisaʡiʦəɾan ħaratəŋ ko~u sapasaɬ~ɮak, ʦaaj ko~u sapiɬ~ɮapo~uŋ to~u saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a ʦiəpo~uʦaj a mifəɾiħ. o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ʦaaj ko~u i nimaaj siʦian kasarəkaɬ~ɮ a mikapiaj, ʦaaj ko~u nano~usiʦian a sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak. to~una pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ a ɾakakawa maɾa sapiʦo~uʡaj no~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ a sakatajaɾ, o~uno~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a maɾa sapiʦo~uʡaj a siʦian ko~u pikiħatija, o~u tato~umirəŋ kami a paso~uwaɾ to~u ʦaajaj. o~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan no~u pipatirəŋ to~u paəʦasan no~u sakatajaɾ i siʦian to~u sapiʡəmət a sako~uwan, ʦaajaj i miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj miɾajap i masakaminawaj ko~u ħaratəŋ. o~u kaŋaɾajan o~uja so~uʡəɾinaj to~u sakifinaʦaɬ~ɮan a paŋiħa, miɬ~ɮama to~u kinaira no~u finawɾan, miʡimər to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan sakaʦiəpo~uʦ a ɬ~ɮajħiw, ʦaaj ko~u maɾo~ujakjakaj ano~u əʦa niɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ a sakatajaɾ. misiʡajaw to~u tatajni nisatəkəɬ~ɮaj ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u, kami ato~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sakipako~uniraaj ato~u tamɬ~ɮawan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ misaʡiʦəɾ to~u kaɾaʦəaj i finawɾan no~u tajwan. o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ʦaaj ko~u nano~u nipasiŋkiw a paja ko~u pipo~uɾo~uŋan, o~u sakaɬ~ɮamaaw no~u saɾo~uŋan a tamɬ~ɮaw; ʦaaj ko~u so~uwaɾ aʦa ko~u sapako~unira a piħapiw, o~u so~uʡəɾinaj a nisimawan. o~u iko~ur no~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, o~u mamipatirəŋ i nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kimpo~u a mapaɾamit, ʦaaj ko~u i nisatəkəɬ~ɮan a mapəɾəŋaj. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u nijaro~uʡ ɾəkatəp. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u matajaɾaj ɾəkatəp. tajwan jinʦo~u~umin saʦəfaŋ. ****/***
S.FORM: == Pangiha a tilid-Yincienhuy == Pakowad to patokoan a siciaan no yincumin - mipa'es to nikapolongan a ngiha sapiliyang to Congko midawa to Taywan. I pisi'ayaw to caayayho a kafokafok sakowan no Taywan i, caay kanga'ay no Yincuminco a misatalimaan. Tona fedfedan no ka'aloman no sician, mapatalaw ko nikapolongan kakawa, malasakatayal no sician kasarekad ko Lipoiing no Yincumin itiya, o mamiliyaw mi'afas patireng kami to sakifinacadan a sician sapangiha salongoc. Malapowin ko kasafinacadan dayhiw no sician a kasarekad Ira ko aenemay patodongan a Lipoiing i laocan no kitakit o a itini kasasiroma masasifeday Taywn a finacadan no yincumin to "paecasan" a sacecayay patokoan a siciaan, o sakalacecayaw pngiha itini no Payrangan sician to sapangiha a salongoc. Nika "o dayhiw no finacadan ko kacitodong a iing no yincuminco i laocan" han i caay aca pilaheci tonini, matiniay a paecasan a sician ahan malapowin aca. O mamiliyang to sakaeca ka palangarifan no mita'o'ay, matini sato o mita'o'ay a kasarekad ko mikadotay to kinaira, mapalit to ko sakacowat no finacadan. Itini miheca saka 4 foladan masapinang ko tinako, malitosaay a lipoiing no yincumin mikotod ci Fu Kunqian tayra i Congko miliso' ci Wang Huningan. O siikoray to nikapolongan no Taywan a pinangan koni, mangalef o pakangodoay to patoko a siciaan no yincuminco. O cipatokoay no finacadan ko fayfay, palosida' to misatekeday sakowan, mihakenoay to nikapolongan telek, masasilecad to kalalood, matiniay o caayay pilaheci to niyah a pikowan, mangalef ko pisiikor to sakalekapotaw no yincuminc. Miasimaanay to katatelek, masakasak aca ko nikapolongan Nanoya misarocod i mafolaay sapico'ayaw palowad to lipoiing, pahapinangay to misatekeday sakowan a pinangan. Tona mimangahan ngangan no tao to pilingangan mipalowad to mifolaay demak, misi'ayaw aca to kaciraraw ko yincuminco a tamdaw i, manengneng ko kasakasak salongoc no tamdawan no finacadan ita, ato pakayniay sician a demak ko pisamsam to finacadan. Caay ko talingafoh sanay a demak ko nian, oya tadamanay sician sinalit a mato: tona o cecay a kasarekad "masasipainiay" to nisatekeday a congkong a pakinali, misatapang i laloma'an no Taywan midemak to "misatekeday pikowan" a kasasipaini minanam i, manengneng no mita ko nikapolongan a malahorac to. Micoker to pipalasawad, midama to nikapolongan a sakowan Misa'ayaw to mirawraway to sakowan i laocan, micoker kami to palowad no finawlan a mipalsawaday a demak. caay ko pilala'is no kasarekad, o sapidamaaw to nikapolongan a lakakawa. Tona langdaway kahecalay a tosaay kasarekad pakayni i nisingkiwan lekakawa, o "mangahay ka'aloman" mi'epiay to laocan, mikari'ang to pakayraan no kimpo i, o pipalasawad ko saikoray sapipatolas a sakadademak no finawlan. Mi'ang'ang kami o finawlan, akaa ka "no finacadan ko harateng" mifalod a micoker to misiikoray to nikapolongan, milecad to milefoay o "finacadan a dayhiw" ya sanay. So'elinay patokoan no yincuminco, caay ko miringiay to sowal ato 'icel no tao, oya itiniay i nikapolongan a rikec ko sapilongoc to sakacisapakonara ato sakacitari'ang. Patirengen ko patokoan sici a demak ko pi'ang'ang O pi'ang'ang niyam: Ono finacadan a patokoan caay ko pifelih milayap to roma a nisa'icelan harateng ko sapasadak, caay ko sapidapong to saki nikapolongan a ciepocay a mifelih. O yincuminco caay ko i nimaay sician kasarekad a mikapiay, caay ko nanosician a sakadademak. Tona pipalasawad a lakakawa mala sapico'ay no kasarekad a sakatayal, ono yincuminco a mala sapico'ay a sician ko pikihatiya, o tatomireng kami a pasowal to caayay. O sakatadamaan no pipatireng to paecasan no sakatayal i sician to sapi'emet a sakowan, caayay i midoedoay milayap i masakaminaway ko harateng. O kangalayan oya so'elinay to sakifinacadan a pangiha, midama to kinaira no finawlan, mi'imer to nikapolongan sakaciepoc a dayhiw, caay ko maloyakyakay ano eca nilooday no kasarekad a sakatayal. Misi'ayaw to tatayni nisatekeday 'adingo, kami ato polong no sakipakoniraay ato tamdawan salongoc misa'icel to kalaceay i finawlan no Taywan. O nikapolongan caay ko nano nipasingkiw a paya ko pipolongan, o sakadamaaw no salongan a tamdaw; caay ko sowal aca ko sapakonira a pihapiw, o so'elinay a nisimawan. O ikor no Taywan yincuminco, o mamipatireng i nikapolongan kimpo a mapalamit, caay ko i nisatekedan a mapelengay. Taywan yincuminco salongoc yofayof. Taywan yincuminco niyaro' lekatep. Taywan yincuminco matayalay lekatep. Taywan yincumin sacefang. 2025/724
S.PHON: == paŋiħa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ-jinʦiənħo~u~uj == pako~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u pato~uko~uan a siʦiaan no~u jinʦo~u~umin - mipaʡəs to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a ŋiħa sapiɾijaŋ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u miɬ~ɮawa to~u tajwan. i pisiʡajaw to~u ʦaajajħo~u a kafo~ukafo~uk sako~uwan no~u tajwan i, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a misataɾimaan. to~una fəɬ~ɮfəɬ~ɮan no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u siʦian, mapataɾaw ko~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kakawa, maɾasakatajaɾ no~u siʦian kasarəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾipo~uiiŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin itija, o~u mamiɾijaw miʡafas patirəŋ kami to~u sakifinaʦaɬ~ɮan a siʦian sapaŋiħa saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. maɾapo~uwin ko~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u siʦian a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u aənəmaj pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a ɾipo~uiiŋ i ɾao~uʦan no~u kitakit o~u a itini kasasiro~uma masasifəɬ~ɮaj tajwn a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u "paəʦasan" a saʦəʦajaj pato~uko~uan a siʦiaan, o~u sakaɾaʦəʦajaw pŋiħa itini no~u pajraŋan siʦian to~u sapaŋiħa a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. nika "o~u ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a iiŋ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i ɾao~uʦan" ħan i ʦaaj aʦa piɾaħəʦi to~unini, matiniaj a paəʦasan a siʦian aħan maɾapo~uwin aʦa. o~u mamiɾijaŋ to~u sakaəʦa ka paɾaŋarifan no~u mitaʡo~uʡaj, matini sato~u o~u mitaʡo~uʡaj a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u mikaɬ~ɮo~utaj to~u kinaira, mapaɾit to~u ko~u sakaʦo~uwat no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. itini miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan masapinaŋ ko~u tinako~u, maɾito~usaaj a ɾipo~uiiŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin miko~uto~uɬ~ɮ ʦi fo~u~u ko~u~un*ian tajra i ʦo~uŋko~u miɾiso~uʡ ʦi waŋ ħo~u~uniŋan. o~u siiko~uraj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan a pinaŋan ko~uni, maŋaɾəf o~u pakaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u pato~uko~u a siʦiaan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. o~u ʦipato~uko~uaj no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u fajfaj, paɾo~usiɬ~ɮaʡ to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj sako~uwan, miħakəno~uaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan təɾək, masasiɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, matiniaj o~u ʦaajaj piɾaħəʦi to~u nijaħ a piko~uwan, maŋaɾəf ko~u pisiiko~ur to~u sakaɾəkapo~utaw no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦ. miasimaanaj to~u katatəɾək, masakasak aʦa ko~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan nano~uja misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ i mafo~uɾaaj sapiʦo~uʡajaw paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾipo~uiiŋ, paħapinaŋaj to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj sako~uwan a pinaŋan. to~una mimaŋaħan ŋaŋan no~u tao~u to~u piɾiŋaŋan mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u mifo~uɾaaj ɬ~ɮəmak, misiʡajaw aʦa to~u kaʦiraraw ko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw i, manəŋnəŋ ko~u kasakasak saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮawan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ita, ato~u pakajniaj siʦian a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u pisamsam to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. ʦaaj ko~u taɾiŋafo~uħ sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u nian, o~uja taɬ~ɮamanaj siʦian sinaɾit a mato~u: to~una o~u ʦəʦaj a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ "masasipainiaj" to~u nisatəkəɬ~ɮaj a ʦo~uŋko~uŋ a pakinaɾi, misatapaŋ i ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u tajwan miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "misatəkəɬ~ɮaj piko~uwan" a kasasipaini minanam i, manəŋnəŋ no~u mita ko~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a maɾaħo~uraʦ to~u. miʦo~ukər to~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ, miɬ~ɮama to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a sako~uwan misaʡajaw to~u mirawrawaj to~u sako~uwan i ɾao~uʦan, miʦo~ukər kami to~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan a mipaɾsawaɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ʦaaj ko~u piɾaɾaʡis no~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ, o~u sapiɬ~ɮamaaw to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a ɾakakawa. to~una ɾaŋɬ~ɮawaj kaħəʦaɾaj a to~usaaj kasarəkaɬ~ɮ pakajni i nisiŋkiwan ɾəkakawa, o~u "maŋaħaj kaʡaɾo~uman" miʡəpiaj to~u ɾao~uʦan, mikariʡaŋ to~u pakajraan no~u kimpo~u i, o~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u saiko~uraj sapipato~uɾas a sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u finawɾan. miʡaŋʡaŋ kami o~u finawɾan, akaa ka "no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u ħaratəŋ" mifaɾo~uɬ~ɮ a miʦo~ukər to~u misiiko~uraj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan, miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u miɾəfo~uaj o~u "finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮajħiw" ja sanaj. so~uʡəɾinaj pato~uko~uan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, ʦaaj ko~u miriŋiaj to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u tao~u, o~uja itiniaj i nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a rikəʦ ko~u sapiɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaʦisapako~unara ato~u sakaʦitariʡaŋ. patirəŋən ko~u pato~uko~uan siʦi a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u piʡaŋʡaŋ o~u piʡaŋʡaŋ nijam: o~uno~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a pato~uko~uan ʦaaj ko~u pifəɾiħ miɾajap to~u ro~uma a nisaʡiʦəɾan ħaratəŋ ko~u sapasaɬ~ɮak, ʦaaj ko~u sapiɬ~ɮapo~uŋ to~u saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a ʦiəpo~uʦaj a mifəɾiħ. o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ʦaaj ko~u i nimaaj siʦian kasarəkaɬ~ɮ a mikapiaj, ʦaaj ko~u nano~usiʦian a sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak. to~una pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ a ɾakakawa maɾa sapiʦo~uʡaj no~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ a sakatajaɾ, o~uno~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a maɾa sapiʦo~uʡaj a siʦian ko~u pikiħatija, o~u tato~umirəŋ kami a paso~uwaɾ to~u ʦaajaj. o~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan no~u pipatirəŋ to~u paəʦasan no~u sakatajaɾ i siʦian to~u sapiʡəmət a sako~uwan, ʦaajaj i miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj miɾajap i masakaminawaj ko~u ħaratəŋ. o~u kaŋaɾajan o~uja so~uʡəɾinaj to~u sakifinaʦaɬ~ɮan a paŋiħa, miɬ~ɮama to~u kinaira no~u finawɾan, miʡimər to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan sakaʦiəpo~uʦ a ɬ~ɮajħiw, ʦaaj ko~u maɾo~ujakjakaj ano~u əʦa niɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ a sakatajaɾ. misiʡajaw to~u tatajni nisatəkəɬ~ɮaj ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u, kami ato~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sakipako~uniraaj ato~u tamɬ~ɮawan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ misaʡiʦəɾ to~u kaɾaʦəaj i finawɾan no~u tajwan. o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ʦaaj ko~u nano~u nipasiŋkiw a paja ko~u pipo~uɾo~uŋan, o~u sakaɬ~ɮamaaw no~u saɾo~uŋan a tamɬ~ɮaw; ʦaaj ko~u so~uwaɾ aʦa ko~u sapako~unira a piħapiw, o~u so~uʡəɾinaj a nisimawan. o~u iko~ur no~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, o~u mamipatirəŋ i nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kimpo~u a mapaɾamit, ʦaaj ko~u i nisatəkəɬ~ɮan a mapəɾəŋaj. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u nijaro~uʡ ɾəkatəp. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u matajaɾaj ɾəkatəp. tajwan jinʦo~u~umin saʦəfaŋ. ****/***
